fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number of the item that is on the promised order.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units, calculated by subtracting the reserved quantity from the outstanding quantity in the Sales Line table.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Unavailable Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items that are not available for the requested delivery date on the order.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the entry.

fields.name: Required Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity required for order promising lines.

fields.name: Requested Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the requested delivery date for the entry.

fields.name: Planned Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planned date that the shipment will be delivered at the customer's address. If the customer requests a delivery date, the program calculates whether the items will be available for delivery on this date. If the items are available, the planned delivery date will be the same as the requested delivery date. If not, the program calculates the date that the items are available for delivery and enters this date in the Planned Delivery Date field.

fields.name: Original Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment date of the entry.

fields.name: Earliest Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Capable to Promise function as the earliest possible shipment date for the item.

fields.name: Requested Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery date that the customer requested, minus the shipping time.

fields.name: Unavailability Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the order promising line is no longer available.
